Actually in the Graph Relations they list [F1] crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs --exports--> ... So maybe "F1" is a node id for the file. So we can include "F1". Also maybe we can include "R1"? Not sure. Let's just include ["F1"].

readiness_state: "evidence_acquired"? Since we are acquiring evidence. The states: not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit. We are acquiring evidence, so "evidence_acquired". So readiness_state: "evidence_acquired".
